content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help — you saved me!
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢了，你帮了我大忙！

options.text: No problem! Good luck on your exams!
Yeah, I’m pretty good at this.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem! Good luck on your exams!' 是礼貌回应感谢并表达祝福的自然表达。选项2显得自夸，不符合礼貌道别语境；选项3虽谦虚但过于消极，缺乏积极收尾；选项4则完全不合礼仪，破坏对话氛围。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate all the advice you’ve given me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢你给我的所有建议。

options.text: Anytime! Feel free to message me if you need more help.
You’re welcome, but I’m busy now.
I guess you didn’t need me after all.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Anytime! Feel free to message me if you need more help.' 既表达了乐意帮助，又开放了未来沟通渠道，符合礼貌道别原则。选项2过于简短生硬；选项3虽有 'you're welcome' 但附加负面信息；选项4带有否定语气，显得不尊重对方。

content.speakerText: Thanks for walking me through this process — it meant a lot.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你一步步指导我，这对我意义重大。

options.text: It was my pleasure. I’m glad I could help!
Yeah, it was kind of boring.
I’ll send you the bill later.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'It was my pleasure. I’m glad I could help!' 是标准、温暖且专业的回应，体现真诚与专业性。选项2贬低了帮助过程，不合语境；选项3是回应赞美而非感谢，语义错位；选项4完全不恰当，破坏信任关系。
